---
title: "ggnomics: ColData / ObsData Plots"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import importlib.util, os
spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("mock_data", os.path.join(os.getcwd(), "examples", "00_mock_data.py"))
mock_data = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
spec.loader.exec_module(mock_data)

from ggnomics import plot_coldata, plot_rowdata

df    = mock_data.make_mock_df(n_cells=500)
adata = mock_data.make_mock_anndata(n_cells=500)
sce   = mock_data.make_mock_sce(n_cells=500)
```

## Overview

`plot_coldata` mirrors scater's `plotColData`: it plots cell-level metadata
against each other.  The geometry is chosen automatically based on column
dtypes and the `shape` argument.

---

## 1 — Scatter plot (both numeric)

```{python}
p = plot_coldata(df, x="n_counts", y="n_genes_detected",
                 color_by="mito_frac", title="n_counts vs n_genes (coloured by mito)")
p.save("examples/img/03a_scatter.png", width=6, height=5, dpi=120)
p
```

### Facet by batch

```{python}
p = plot_coldata(df, x="n_counts", y="n_genes_detected",
                 facet_by="batch", title="QC scatter faceted by batch")
p.save("examples/img/03b_scatter_facet.png", width=10, height=5, dpi=120)
p
```

---

## 2 — Violin (categorical x)

```{python}
p = plot_coldata(df, x="cluster", y="n_counts", shape="violin",
                 title="n_counts per cluster — violin")
p.save("examples/img/03c_violin.png", width=7, height=5, dpi=120)
p
```

## 3 — Boxplot

```{python}
p = plot_coldata(df, x="cluster", y="mito_frac", shape="box",
                 title="mito_frac per cluster — boxplot")
p.save("examples/img/03d_box.png", width=7, height=5, dpi=120)
p
```

## 4 — Bar chart

```{python}
p = plot_coldata(df, x="cluster", y="n_counts", shape="bar",
                 title="mean n_counts per cluster — bar")
p.save("examples/img/03e_bar.png", width=6, height=5, dpi=120)
p
```

## 5 — Strip / jitter

```{python}
p = plot_coldata(df, x="cluster", y="n_genes_detected", shape="point",
                 color_by="batch", title="n_genes per cluster — jitter")
p.save("examples/img/03f_strip.png", width=7, height=5, dpi=120)
p
```

---

## 6 — AnnData and SCE

```{python}
p = plot_coldata(adata, x="n_counts", y="n_genes_detected", shape="violin",
                 x="cluster", title="AnnData — violin")
p.save("examples/img/03g_adata.png", width=7, height=5, dpi=120)
p
```

```{python}
p = plot_coldata(sce, x="cluster", y="n_counts", shape="box",
                 title="SCE — boxplot")
p.save("examples/img/03h_sce.png", width=7, height=5, dpi=120)
p
```

---

## 7 — Row/feature data (`plot_rowdata`)

For AnnData this plots `var` metadata.

```{python}
p = plot_rowdata(adata, x="mean_expr", y="mean_expr",
                 color_by="highly_variable", title="Feature mean expression")
p.save("examples/img/03i_rowdata.png", width=6, height=5, dpi=120)
p
```

---

## Key parameters

| Parameter | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `x`, `y` | Obs/var column names |
| `color_by` | Obs column for point/fill color |
| `shape` | `"point"` / `"violin"` / `"box"` / `"bar"` |
| `size` | Point size (`None` → adaptive) |
| `facet_by` | Obs column for faceting |
